description_long: This is a modern, self-balancing hoverboard with a sleek, streamlined body finished in a glossy red color. The device features two large, black rubberized wheels on either side, partially enclosed by the main body for safety and aesthetics. The top surface has two distinct black footpads with a textured, grippy finish, designed to provide secure footing and likely embedded with pressure sensors for control. Subtle green indicator lights are visible near the center, suggesting battery or operational status. The hoverboard's body is constructed from a durable plastic shell, likely reinforced with internal metal framing for strength, and houses the necessary electronics and battery components. The branding 'RAD BOARDS' is visible on one side, adding a touch of identity to the design.
description: A glossy red hoverboard with black footpads, large side wheels, and green indicator lights, featuring the 'RAD BOARDS' logo on one side. The design is sleek and modern, with textured footpads and partially enclosed wheels.
description_view_0: Side view showing the hoverboard's slim profile, glossy red body, and both black footpads; wheels are mostly hidden.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting a single large black wheel, rounded red casing, and the central green indicator light.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, but with the 'RAD BOARDS' logo clearly visible on the lower left side.
description_view_3: Rear view mirroring the front, showing the other large wheel, rounded casing, and central indicator light.
attribute_wheel_configuration: Two large, parallel wheels, one on each side of the board, partially enclosed by the red casing; wheels are black with a solid, robust appearance.
attribute_footpad_design: Two rectangular black footpads, one on each side of the central hinge, with a textured, grippy surface for traction; likely embedded with pressure sensors and slightly raised edges for foot placement guidance.
attribute_lighting_features: Small green indicator lights near the center of the board, likely for operational or battery status; no other visible lighting elements.
attribute_brand_logo: A white 'RAD BOARDS' logo is visible on the lower left side of the board in view 2.
attribute_control_interface: No external buttons or switches are visible; control is likely via footpad sensors and internal gyroscopic mechanisms.
